'''''Evanrue''''' was a [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] in the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]]. In [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]], it was part of the fleet assigned to defend [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], and participated in the [[Siege of Coruscant]]. Near the end of the battle, ''Evanrue'' collided with a [[Cloaking device/Legends|cloaked]] [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] which had been launched by the [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Imperial Star Destroyer]] [[Chimaera/Legends|''Chimaera'']], and suffered heavy damage.
